reviews.comment:
Cuenta con baños limpios,  amplios y con los elementos de higiene. Además el Fast Food está bien provisto ; la atención es rápida y correcta.

(Translated by Google)
It has clean, spacious restrooms with all the necessary hygiene supplies. The fast food is also well-stocked, and the service is quick and efficient.
